main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'acondicionamiento insuficiente... bisulfito y glicerina' matches

key_signals.justification: C2: 9 signals (1x30min, ramp 5min, 1% bisulfito+glicerina, glicerina 320, ORP -10, dP, caudal)

alternatives.justification: C3: 3 alts (daño hidraulico, ensuciamiento, variacion intrinseca) bien descartadas

recommended_action.justification: C4: 3 aclarados + ramp 30 min sin oxidantes/cloro - matches gold sin CIP

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: COD<50 + caudal ~70% + rechazo no mejora -> daño/incompatibilidad
